# AI Motion Lab

AI Motion Lab creates AI video, motion design, 3D product visuals, advertising videos, animated covers, and visual packs for brands, bloggers, producers, agencies, and businesses.

Main site: https://aivideomotionru-cloud.github.io/ai-motion-lab-portfolio/
Language: Russian
Market: Russia
Contact: aivideo.motion.ru@gmail.com

Services:
- AI advertising videos for Reels, Shorts, Stories, and social ads
- Motion design packs for creators and brands
- 3D product visuals and packshots
- Video concepts, scripts, covers, and visual style development

Portfolio examples:
- NOIR AURA: perfume advertising video
- EMBER TABLE: restaurant promo video with Russian voiceover
- PET MATE: pet store promo video
- LUMINA SKIN: beauty product cinematic ad
- AEROFORM: 3D product shot
- NOVA HALL: event venue promo
